included.text: Daily breakfast and regional dinner meals
Local experienced driver and sightseeing guide
Private air-conditioned transfers for the entire route

itinerary.title: Arrive in Mysore & Royal Heritage
itinerary.description: Arrive in Mysore. Explore the majestic Mysore Palace, Chamundi Hills, and enjoy the musical fountain show at Brindavan Gardens.

itinerary.title: Coracle Ride at Hogenakkal Falls & Departure
itinerary.description: Drive to Hogenakkal Falls. Enjoy a traditional coracle boat ride right under the massive, roaring waterfalls before returning for your departure.

title: Mysore & Hogenakkal: Palaces & Waterfalls Tour
description: Combine the royal heritage of Mysore with the raw natural power of Hogenakkal Falls. Marvel at the grand architecture of Mysore Palace and Brindavan Gardens, then take a traditional coracle boat ride down the roaring, misty waters of the Kaveri river at Hogenakkal.
highlights: Tour the historic Mysore Palace and Chamundi Hills
Experience a thrilling coracle boat ride at Hogenakkal Falls
Relax in the serene garden settings of Mysore
